TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit DeploymentStackData extends Azure.ResourceManager.Models.ResourceData implements class System.ClientModel.Primitives.IJsonModel`1<class Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.DeploymentStacks.DeploymentStackData>, class System.ClientModel.Primitives.IPersistableModel`1<class Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.DeploymentStacks.DeploymentStackData>
Public Class DeploymentStackData Inherits ResourceData Implements IJsonModel(Of DeploymentStackData), IPersistableModel(Of DeploymentStackData)
type DeploymentStackData = class inherit ResourceData interface IJsonModel<DeploymentStackData> interface IPersistableModel<DeploymentStackData>

Docs.summary: Deployment stack object.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed

Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of .
Defines the behavior of resources that are no longer managed after the Deployment stack is updated or deleted.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property BypassStackOutOfSyncError As Nullable(Of Boolean)
member this.BypassStackOutOfSyncError : Nullable<bool> with get, set

Docs.summary: Flag to bypass service errors that indicate the stack resource list is not correctly synchronized.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property CorrelationId As String

Docs.summary: The correlation id of the last Deployment stack upsert or delete operation. It is in GUID format and is used for tracing.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.DebugSettingDetailLevel : string with get, set

Docs.summary: Specifies the type of information to log for debugging. The permitted values are none, requestContent, responseContent, or both requestContent and responseContent separated by a comma. The default is none. When setting this value, carefully consider the type of information that is being passed in during deployment. By logging information about the request or response, sensitive data that is retrieved through the deployment operations could potentially be exposed.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property DeletedResources As IReadOnlyList(Of DeploymentStackResourceReference)

Docs.summary: An array of resources that were deleted during the most recent Deployment stack update. Deleted means that the resource was removed from the template and relevant deletion operations were specified.
Defines how resources deployed by the stack are locked.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property DeploymentExtensions As IReadOnlyList(Of DeploymentExtension)

Docs.summary: The extensions used during deployment. Contains extension data for all extensible resources managed by the stack.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property DeploymentId As String

Docs.summary: The resourceId of the deployment resource created by the deployment stack.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.DeploymentScope : string with get, set

Docs.summary: The scope at which the initial deployment should be created. If a scope is not specified, it will default to the scope of the deployment stack. Valid scopes are: management group (format: '/providers/Microsoft.Management/managementGroups/{managementGroupId}'), subscription (format: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}'), resource group (format: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}').

MemberSignature.Value: member this.Description : string with get, set

Docs.summary: Deployment stack description. Max length of 4096 characters.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property DetachedResources As IReadOnlyList(Of DeploymentStackResourceReference)

Docs.summary: An array of resources that were detached during the most recent Deployment stack update. Detached means that the resource was removed from the template, but no relevant deletion operations were specified. So, the resource still exists while no longer being associated with the stack.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property Duration As Nullable(Of TimeSpan)

Docs.summary: The duration of the last successful Deployment stack update.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property Error As ResponseError

Docs.summary: The error detail.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property ExtensionConfigs As IDictionary(Of String, DeploymentExtensionConfig)

Docs.summary: The deployment extension configs. Keys of this object are extension aliases as defined in the deployment template.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property ExternalInputDefinitions As IDictionary(Of String, DeploymentExternalInputDefinition)

Docs.summary: External input definitions, used by external tooling to define expected external input values.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property ExternalInputs As IDictionary(Of String, DeploymentExternalInput)

Docs.summary: External input values, used by external tooling for parameter evaluation.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property FailedResources As IReadOnlyList(Of DeploymentStackResourceReferenceExtended)

Docs.summary: An array of resources that failed to reach goal state during the most recent update. Each resourceId is accompanied by an error message.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property Location As Nullable(Of AzureLocation)
member this.Location : Nullable<Azure.Core.AzureLocation> with get, set

Docs.summary: The geo-location where the resource lives. Required for subscription and management group scoped stacks. The location is inherited from the resource group for resource group scoped stacks.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property Outputs As BinaryData

Docs.summary: The outputs of the deployment resource created by the deployment stack.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property Parameters As IDictionary(Of String, DeploymentParameterItem)

Docs.summary: Name and value pairs that define the deployment parameters for the template. Use this element when providing the parameter values directly in the request, rather than linking to an existing parameter file. Use either the parametersLink property or the parameters property, but not both.
The URI of parameters file. Use this element to link to an existing parameters file. Use either the parametersLink property or the parameters property, but not both.

Docs.summary: State of the deployment stack.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property Resources As IReadOnlyList(Of DeploymentStackManagedResourceReference)

Docs.summary: An array of resources currently managed by the deployment stack.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.Template : BinaryData with get, set

Docs.summary: The template content. You use this element when you want to pass the template syntax directly in the request rather than link to an existing template. It can be a JObject or well-formed JSON string. Use either the templateLink property or the template property, but not both.
The URI of the template. Use either the templateLink property or the template property, but not both.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property ValidationLevel As Nullable(Of DeploymentStackValidationLevel)

Docs.summary: The validation level of the deployment stack.
